channel.title: UB Analytics · World Cup 2026 Predictions
channel.description: Matchday predictions with public track record.

item.title: Portugal vs Uzbekistan: Portugal by 1 (56%)
item.description: Group K, 2026-06-23, Houston. Portugal 56% / draw 26% / Uzbekistan 18%. Predicted margin 1.

item.title: Colombia vs DR Congo: Colombia by 1 (64%)
item.description: Group K, 2026-06-23, Zapopan. Colombia 64% / draw 23% / DR Congo 13%. Predicted margin 1.

item.title: England vs Ghana: England by 2 (83%)
item.description: Group L, 2026-06-23, Foxborough. England 83% / draw 13% / Ghana 4%. Predicted margin 2.

item.title: Panama vs Croatia: Croatia by 1 (45%)
item.description: Group L, 2026-06-23, Toronto. Panama 25% / draw 29% / Croatia 45%. Predicted margin 1.
